reason: Pulp Fiction slams from one tense crime vignette to the next with razor-sharp dialogue and cynicism
L.A. Confidential exposes raw corruption in 1950s LA with brutal, cynical power plays
Goodfellas delivers unflinching, gritty mob drama without a shred of romantic sugarcoating
Casino pits ruthless crime lords and cops in a high-stakes, merciless underworld drama
Heat pits master criminals and cops in an unrelenting, cynical duel of wits and bullets
Carlito’s Way crafts raw street-wise crime drama with no-romance focus on loyalty and betrayal
Seven chills with merciless detectives chasing a twisted killer in slick, unromantic tension
Natural Born Killers delivers savage, stylish crime carnage with zero sentimental romance
Reservoir Dogs traps criminals in a claustrophobic crime standoff drenched in cynical violence
Donnie Brasco exposes undercover mafia life in a gritty crime drama with no rom-com relief
